# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 1.0.x   | Yes       |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security issue, **do NOT open a public issue.**

Instead, email us directly: **srikarvardhan2005@gmail.com**

We will respond within 48 hours and work with you to address the issue.

## What MAX Does NOT Do
- MAX does NOT collect any data
- MAX does NOT connect to the internet (except optional update check)
- MAX does NOT modify system files
- MAX does NOT require admin privileges (some features work better with admin)
- MAX stores settings locally in `%APPDATA%\ProjectMAX\` — nowhere else
